$schema_comment: Copy to enclave-keyops.<env>.json, fill real paths, and never commit files containing secrets.
$qos_client_release_comment: Optional. When non-null records the GitHub release Builder published this client from, e.g. {"tag": "0xkey-qos_client-v0.1.0", "repo": "0xkey-io/qos", "platform": "darwin-arm64"}. doctor uses it to print a precise fetch command when the binary is missing.
$manifest_nonce_comment: Per-service. First ceremony: set to 0. Each subsequent ceremony: increment by 1. Must not be null when running manifest generate.
$kustomize_overlay_path_comment: MUST be an absolute path to the K8s overlay directory; relative paths are rejected.

paths.$share_set_io_comment: Optional Share-Set member dirs. `ceremony reencrypt` writes wrapped shares / share-set approvals here and `bundle create --kind wrapped-shares` reads them from here — single source of truth so the two never drift. Defaults shown; only set if you override reencrypt's --wrapped-out-dir / --share-set-approvals-dir.

services.name: signer
services.$host_ip_comment: Set to "127.0.0.1" when using kubectl port-forward from a local machine; leave null when using --resolve-pod-ip from within the cluster.
services.$post_share_members_order_comment: Order in which wrapped shares are installed during `ceremony post`. JSON array of member indices (e.g. [1, 2]) or a comma string ("1,2" / "m1,m2"); null falls back to the --post-global-order flag, then to [1, 2].
